queries.q: Write up the results of our three-day spike on integrating with the Stripe Billing API
We time-boxed two days to see if WebSockets can handle 50k concurrent connections on our stack. Document what we found and whether to proceed.
Summarize the proof-of-concept we ran on the vector database options before the team meeting
The feasibility investigation into server-side PDF generation is done. Capture the approach, findings, and recommendation.
Document the outcome of our exploration into replacing the legacy search with Typesense, including the benchmarks we collected
I spent a week prototyping the offline sync engine. Turn my scratch notes into a structured summary the team can act on.
Write a spike summary for the LLM summarization experiment: what we tried, the evidence, and the open questions
Our designer time-boxed an exploration of canvas-based editing versus DOM-based. Capture the findings and a clear go or no-go.
Before we commit engineers to the migration, document what the proof of concept on zero-downtime schema changes actually showed
The team finished investigating whether the vendor SDK supports our SSO requirements. Get the learnings on paper so nobody has to repeat the explanation.
The spike settled it: we are adopting Typesense. Write the formal decision record with context and consequences.
queries.notes: The spike informed; recording the decision itself is ADR work

queries.q: We ran eight exploratory user interviews about the sync feature last week. Pull out the patterns and insights.
queries.notes: User research exploration, not technical or design feasibility

queries.q: Based on what the prototype showed, draft a one-page proposal to get stakeholders behind the offline-first approach
queries.notes: Proposing the solution the spike pointed to

queries.q: Help us scope the investigation into edge caching: what question should the spike answer and how long should we time-box it?
queries.notes: Spike has not happened yet; this skill documents results

queries.q: My Docker build keeps failing on the M1 runner, help me fix it
Write the retro doc for the sprint that just ended, what went well and what didn't
Capture our decision to standardize on the vendor SDK for SSO, including the trade-offs we accepted
Draft an instrumentation spec for the new sync feature so we can measure adoption
Recommend a good hotel near the Austin office for my onsite next week
Document edge cases and error states for the file upload flow before QA planning
